rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE WHETHER POLICY LIMITS HAVE BEEN EXHAUSTED. (NH)

rulings.Case Title: MARC KASKY VS. PERRIGO COMPANY et al
MARC KASKY VS. PERRIGO COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Sto Stike Complaint By Plaintiff Mark Kasky; P&A; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO STRIKE DENIED. FTC LEGISLATION AND FTC CONSENT ORDER DO NOT HAVE PRECLUSIVE EFFECT OR PREEMPT STATES REMEDY. SEE 15USC 57b(e). (AJR/AS(EX))

rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE DAMAGES I.E. RENTAL VALUE OF PROJECT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE RETAILIATION AS A DEFENSE TO ELLIS ACT GRANTED. (JK)

rulings.Rulings: HEARING REQUIRED. MOTION TO QUASH WILL BE DENIED IF PROOF OF SERVICE FOR PLTF IS PROVIDED. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: LOUISE O'DONNELL VS. RANDALL LOVELAND et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NOTICE DOES NOT SPECIFY "NAME AND TELEPHONE NUMBER AND ADDRESS OF PERSON TO WHOM THE RENT PAYMENT SHALL BE MADE" AS REQUIRED BY CCP1161(2). NOTICE TO BE STRICTLY CONSTRUED. (JK)
